1057.issue: [E1057] admin 6.17.14 listed as dependency but 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please update globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/io-package.json).

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#763] "[iobroker-bot] Update Dependabot Configuration – Add npm Cooldown"](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/issues/763)

8905.issue: [W8905] Repository contains [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/package.json) files in non-root directories (e.g. /src-admin/package.json). Dependabot may miss updates unless the "npm" ecosystem entry uses "directories: ['**/*']" instead of "directory: '/'"

0048.issue: [S0048] At least one devDpendency at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.modbus/blob/master/package.json) requires a specific version. Consider using "~1.2.3" or "^1.2.3" syntax unless freezing dependencies is really desired.
